data.name: Alien Maze
data.detailed_description:
(一) 遊戲簡介

《Alien Maze/異界迷宮》是一款主打益智迷宮探索類的闖關遊戲,玩家需要開動腦筋在有限的時間內到達出口。

(二) 遊戲玩法

遊戲操作使用鍵盤操作移動的方式，通過道路得到迷宮中的橡果。

操作方式

W（上）S（下）A（左）D（右）

迷宮道路蜿蜒曲折，一不留神就會走錯道路，開動腦筋，走出迷宮吧。

遊戲內置一鍵解鎖功能。在遊戲內的封面中同時按下數字鍵2和5，

按一次解鎖一個關卡，按兩次解鎖所有關卡。

data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 英文, 日文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT 740
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Sound Device
  • 備註: Windows 7 may have compatibility problems.

data.name: Alien Maze
data.detailed_description:
（1） Introduction to the game

"Alien Maze" is a puzzle game to explore the maze. Players need to reach the exit in a limited time.

（2） Game play

The game operation uses the keyboard to operate the movement, and gets the acorn in the maze through the road.

Operation mode

W (upper) S (lower) A (left) D (right)

The labyrinth road is winding. If you are not careful, you will go wrong. Use your brain and get out of the labyrinth.

The game has a built-in one-button unlocking function.You need to press the 2 and 5 keys in Game MainMenu,

Press once to unlock one level, and press twice to unlock all levels.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GT 740
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 11 Sound Device
  • Additional Notes: Windows 7 may have compatibility problems.
